summary: ANDROID 🟥 | FMD | Play/Pause button giving different outcomes
scenario: When a user connects a device, presses Play, then Stop, then Play again quickly, no tone is heard on the second Play, tones stack causing noise, and the Pause button disappears.
description_clean: In FMD, when a user connects a device and presses Play, then Stop, then Play again, two issues occur: (1) No tone is heard when pressing Play the second time. (2) Tones can stack, producing very bad noise, and the Pause button disappears, forcing the user to turn off the device. This can be reproduced on every device when clicking quickly.
expected: Tone is heard when pressing Play the second time. Pause button remains visible. No tone stacking or bad noise.
actual: (1) No tone is heard when pressing Play the second time. (2) Tones can stack, producing very bad noise, and the Pause button disappears, forcing the user to turn off the device.
